---
title: "Görseller"
description: "Narin Güran davasıyla ilgili görsel arşiv."
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: categories
    contents:
      - olay-yeri.qmd
      - durusmalar.qmd
      - adalet-nobeti.qmd
      - aile.qmd
      - basin-roportaj.qmd
      - narin.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
---

::: {#categories}
:::
